# WatchDeck Environment Variables
# Generated by: watchdeck init

# MongoDB connection string (required)
MX_DB_URI={{DB_URI}}

# MongoDB collection prefix (default: mx_)
MX_DB_PREFIX={{DB_PREFIX}}

# Discord bot token (required if modules.discord = true)
# MX_DISCORD_TOKEN=

# Slack bot token (required if modules.slack = true)
# MX_SLACK_TOKEN=

# 32-character encryption key for storing sensitive channel credentials
MX_ENCRYPTION_KEY={{ENCRYPTION_KEY}}
